posts.author: Bryan
posts.title: Microphone button hides reply input on mobile
posts.body: The microphone button hides the text input to reply to board posts on mobile devices.

posts.author: Bryan
posts.title: Improve the top nav bar
posts.body: The top nav bar doesn’t have enough space at the top and is showing up underneath the iPhone status bar things. Also, don’t wrap the nav links - one scrollable row is ok.
